title: Cannot connect to Podman after just a while, under macports
body:
```sh
$ podman run -it ‐‐userns=keep‐id debian
Error: invalid reference format

$ podman version

OS/Arch:      darwin/arm64

Built:        Mon Dec 11 08:22:43 2023
OS/Arch:      linux/arm64

$ podman info

  networkBackendInfo:

    dns:
      package: aardvark-dns-1.9.0-1.fc39.aarch64
      path: /usr/libexec/podman/aardvark-dns
      version: aardvark-dns 1.9.0

  pasta:
    executable: /usr/bin/pasta
    package: passt-0^20231204.gb86afe3-1.fc39.aarch64

      There is NO WARRANTY, to the extent permitted by law.
  remoteSocket:
    exists: true

    capabilities: CAP_CHOWN,CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE,CAP_FOWNER,CAP_FSETID,CAP_KILL,CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE,CAP_SETFCAP,CAP_SETGID,CAP_SETPCAP,CAP_SETUID,CAP_SYS_CHROOT
    rootless: true

  serviceIsRemote: true
  slirp4netns:

      SLIRP_CONFIG_VERSION_MAX: 4

  swapTotal: 0
  uptime: 2h 12m 11.00s (Approximately 0.08 days)
  variant: v8
plugins:
  authorization: null
  log:
  - k8s-file
  - none
  - passthrough
  - journald
  network:
  - bridge

  - ipvlan
  volume:

  graphDriverName: overlay

  graphRoot: /var/home/core/.local/share/containers/storage

  graphRootUsed: 5852426240

    Native Overlay Diff: "true"
    Supports d_type: "true"

    number: 14
  runRoot: /run/user/501/containers
  transientStore: false
  volumePath: /var/home/core/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes

  APIVersion: 4.8.2

  BuiltTime: Mon Dec 11 08:22:43 2023
  GitCommit: ""
  GoVersion: go1.21.4

  OsArch: linux/arm64

$ sw_vers
ProductName:		macOS
ProductVersion:		14.2.1
BuildVersion:		23C71
```

_Originally posted by @AntonioSun in https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/21196#issuecomment-1881515392_
            
About 2+ hours after I posted above, I cannot run any podman command any more:

```sh
$ podman ps
Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman socket: failed to connect: ssh: handshake failed: read tcp 127.0.0.1:49410->127.0.0.1:62451: read: connection reset by peer

$ podman info
OS: darwin/arm64
provider: qemu
version: 4.8.2

Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman socket: failed to connect: ssh: handshake failed: read tcp 127.0.0.1:49415->127.0.0.1:62451: read: connection reset by peer
```

This is not the first time I'm experiencing it. I got podman setup last night but this morning I got `Cannot connect to Podman` so I followed the advice and started from `podman machine init` again this morning. 

Things are working fine, until I access podman again about 2 hours later. During this 2 hours, I didn't force the machine into sleep myself, at most just let it idle there.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
please try again with podman 5.0, I am going to assume this is fixed there.
